description: Plan, direct, or coordinate entertainment and recreational activities and operations of a recreational facility, including cruise ships and parks. All personal service managers not listed separately. Manage or coordinate fitness and wellness programs and services. Manage and train staff of wellness specialists, health educators, or fitness instructors. (Based on 12 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Track attendance, participation, or performance data related to wellness events.
Inventory products and order new supplies for wellness programs and events.
Perform accounting duties, such as recording daily cash flow and preparing bank deposits.
Recruit, interview, and hire employees for wellness and fitness programs.
Respond to customer inquiries or complaints regarding services and programs.
Schedule staff and supervise their scheduling to maximize facility efficiency.
Verify staff credentials, including educational and certification requirements.
Develop or implement marketing strategies and campaigns for wellness programs.
Coordinate facility maintenance and repair to ensure safe and clean environments.
Maintain client databases and records related to wellness and fitness services.
Participate in continuing education to maintain current knowledge of wellness industry practices.
Organize and oversee fitness or wellness programs, including health screenings and events.
Develop, implement, or coordinate fitness and wellness programs or services.
Prepare reports or presentations to communicate program needs, status, or evaluations.
Train staff in wellness policies and procedures, including compliance and service delivery.
Maintain or arrange for maintenance of fitness equipment or recreational facilities.
Monitor compliance with applicable health, safety, or hygiene standards in wellness programs.
Conduct needs assessments to determine interest in or satisfaction with wellness programs.
Manage or oversee wellness facilities and ensure all programs meet safety guidelines.
Support employees in wellness aspects, acting as a confidential point of contact for issues.
Direct documentation efforts to ensure compliance with legal and regulatory standards.
Develop relationships and communicate with customers, site managers, developers, land owners, authorities, utility representatives, or residents.
Supervise employees or subcontractors to ensure quality of work or adherence to safety regulations or policies.
Oversee the maintenance of wind field equipment or structures, such as towers, transformers, electrical collector systems, roadways, or other site assets.
Coordinate theft and fraud investigations involving career criminals or organized group activities, including employee theft.
Review or evaluate proposals or bids to make recommendations regarding awarding of contracts, including for wind projects.
Manage site assessments or environmental studies for wind fields and prepare applications for required permits.
Provide verbal or written project status reports to project teams, management, subcontractors, customers, or owners.
Monitor compliance with operational, safety, or inventory control procedures, including physical security standards.
Evaluate fitness and wellness programs to determine their effectiveness and develop strategies to eliminate potential for loss.
Administer systems and programs to reduce loss, maintain inventory control, or increase safety, including training employees in operations and safety.
